title.zh: 从零构建一个迷你编程 Agent
title.en: Build a Nano Coding Agent from 0 to 1

tagline.zh: 一次只讲一个机制，亲手拼出一个 Claude Code 风格的智能体。
tagline.en: One mechanism at a time — assemble a Claude-Code-like agent by hand.

theProblem.zh: 模型只会说话，怎样才能让它真正去读写文件、执行动作？
theProblem.en: The model can only talk — how do we make it actually read/write files and take action?

objective.zh: 理解 while 循环如何让模型与工具反复交互，直到任务完成。
objective.en: Understand how a while-loop bounces control between the model and tools until the task is done.

theProblem.zh: 同一个模型，为什么会表现出完全不同的「性格」？
theProblem.en: Same model — why does it behave like a completely different agent?

objective.zh: 看清系统提示词如何在一开始就塑造 agent 的行为边界。
objective.en: See how the system prompt sets the agent's behavior budget before turn one.

theProblem.zh: 模型点了 read_file，我们怎么安全地把请求转成一次真正的函数调用？
theProblem.en: When the model calls read_file, how do we safely route that to a real function?

objective.zh: 把工具建模成「描述 + 异步函数」，并实现统一的执行入口。
objective.en: Model a tool as description + async function and build one execution entry point.

theProblem.zh: Agent 怎么「记得」自己刚刚做过什么？
theProblem.en: How does the agent remember what it just did?

objective.zh: 理解 messages 数组如何累积成上下文，并掌握会话记忆的边界。
objective.en: Understand how the messages array accumulates into context — and where memory ends.

theProblem.zh: 工具抛错了，agent 会崩溃还是自我修正？
theProblem.en: When a tool throws, does the agent crash — or course-correct?

objective.zh: 把错误变成消息塞回去，让模型基于失败继续推理。
objective.en: Turn errors into messages so the model can keep reasoning from the failure.

theProblem.zh: 零散的模块，如何拼成一个能跑的命令行 agent？
theProblem.en: How do the pieces become a single runnable CLI agent?

objective.zh: 用入口文件把提示词、循环、工具连成一个可交互的程序。
objective.en: Wire prompt + loop + tools into one interactive program via the entry file.
